'''鈭歜-f-s''' ('''kabafas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stainproof|stainproof]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-f-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stainproof|stainproof]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-f-s
|-
! Lemma
| kabafas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibafas|thibafas]] || [[word:jibafas|jibafas]] || [[word:shibafas|shibafas]] || [[word:kibafas|kibafas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubafas|thuthubafas]] || [[word:jujubafas|jujubafas]] || [[word:shushubafas|shushubafas]] || [[word:kukubafas|kukubafas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubafas|thubafas]] || [[word:jubafas|jubafas]] || [[word:shubafas|shubafas]] || [[word:kubafas|kubafas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubafas|thubafas]] || [[word:jubafas|jubafas]] || [[word:shubafas|shubafas]] || [[word:kubafas|kubafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebafas|thebafas]] || [[word:jebafas|jebafas]] || [[word:shebafas|shebafas]] || [[word:kebafas|kebafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobafas|thothobafas]] || [[word:jojobafas|jojobafas]] || [[word:shoshobafas|shoshobafas]] || [[word:kokobafas|kokobafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobafas|thobafas]] || [[word:jobafas|jobafas]] || [[word:shobafas|shobafas]] || [[word:kobafas|kobafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobafas|thobafas]] || [[word:jobafas|jobafas]] || [[word:shobafas|shobafas]] || [[word:kobafas|kobafas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bafas|bafas]] || [[word:bafas|bafas]] || [[word:bafas|bafas]] || [[word:bafas|bafas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bafas|bafas]] || [[word:bafas|bafas]] || [[word:bafas|bafas]] || [[word:bafas|bafas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bafas|bafas]] || [[word:bafas|bafas]] || [[word:bafas|bafas]] || [[word:bafas|bafas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bafas|bafas]] || [[word:bafas|bafas]] || [[word:bafas|bafas]] || [[word:bafas|bafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bafas|th忙bafas]] || [[word:j忙bafas|j忙bafas]] || [[word:sh忙bafas|sh忙bafas]] || [[word:k忙bafas|k忙bafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabafas|thathabafas]] || [[word:jajabafas|jajabafas]] || [[word:shashabafas|shashabafas]] || [[word:kakabafas|kakabafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabafas|thabafas]] || [[word:jabafas|jabafas]] || [[word:shabafas|shabafas]] || [[word:kabafas|kabafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabafas|thabafas]] || [[word:jabafas|jabafas]] || [[word:shabafas|shabafas]] || [[word:kabafas|kabafas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabafas|shabafas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabafas|goshabafas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabafas|gokishabafas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabafasn眉|shabafasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabafasnkn眉|goshabafasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabafasn眉|gokishabafasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabafassh毛|shabafassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabafasnksh毛|goshabafasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabafassh毛|gokishabafassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabafasro|shabafasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabafasnkro|goshabafasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabafasro|gokishabafasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabafasmu|shabafasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabafasnkmu|goshabafasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabafasmu|gokishabafasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabafassher|shabafassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabafasnksher|goshabafasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabafassher|gokishabafassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabafasng|shabafasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabafasnkng|goshabafasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabafasng|gokishabafasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabafasya|shabafasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabafasnkya|goshabafasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabafasya|gokishabafasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabafasyam|shabafasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabafasnkyam|goshabafasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabafasyam|gokishabafasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabafasn眉sh毛|shabafasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabafasnkn眉sh毛|goshabafasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabafasn眉sh毛|gokishabafasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabafasn眉ro|shabafasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabafasnkn眉ro|goshabafasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabafasn眉ro|gokishabafasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabafasn眉mu|shabafasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabafasnkn眉mu|goshabafasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabafasn眉mu|gokishabafasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabafassh毛n眉|shabafassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabafasnksh毛n眉|goshabafasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabafassh毛n眉|gokishabafassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabafassh毛ro|shabafassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabafasnksh毛ro|goshabafasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabafassh毛ro|gokishabafassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabafassh毛mu|shabafassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabafasnksh毛mu|goshabafasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabafassh毛mu|gokishabafassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabafasron眉|shabafasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabafasnkron眉|goshabafasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabafasron眉|gokishabafasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabafasrosh毛|shabafasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabafasnkrosh毛|goshabafasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabafasrosh毛|gokishabafasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabafasromu|shabafasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabafasnkromu|goshabafasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabafasromu|gokishabafasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabafasmun眉|shabafasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabafasnkmun眉|goshabafasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabafasmun眉|gokishabafasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabafasmush毛|shabafasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabafasnkmush毛|goshabafasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabafasmush毛|gokishabafasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabafasmuro|shabafasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabafasnkmuro|goshabafasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabafasmuro|gokishabafasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
